preview.title: Magnet Content Preview
preview.subtitle: Check files and magnet details before downloading
preview.previewImageLoaded: Preview image extracted from the search source and integrated into the magnet file preview.
preview.previewImageFallback: No preview image is available for this result, so a file-type preview marker is shown.
preview.noFiles: No file list is available. Copy the magnet link into your downloader to inspect details.

messages.playStarted: Magnet link copied and built-in player opened.
messages.playStartedCopyFallback: Built-in player opened, but automatic copy failed; the player will still receive the magnet through the URL.
messages.copyFailed: Copy failed. Select the magnet link and copy it manually.
